src: The pro_video_editor is a Flutter widget designed for video editing within your application. It provides a flexible and convenient way to integrate powerful video editing capabilities into your Flutter project.
ja: pro_video_editorはアプリケーション内での動画編集向けに設計されたFlutterウィジェット。Flutterプロジェクトに強力な動画編集機能を柔軟かつ手軽に統合できる
